name: Patty Ann's Mincemeat Bars
recipeInstructions:
FOR CRUST:
Grease a 7 x 11 x 2 inch pan. Combine the crust ingredients and mix well.
Press half of the mixture into the pan. Spread with mincemeat filling.
FOR FILLING:
Simmer all filling ingredients together until thickened. Cool. Spread over dough in the pan, and cover with remaining dough. Pat down well. Bake at 350 degreesF for 25-35 minutes. Cool in the pan. Cut into squares.
Store in the tin box between layers of wax paper.
